style_a.name: 港片复古胶片
style_a.prompt_suffix: Wong Kar-wai style, high contrast, heavy film grain, red and green neon glow, warm yellow tones, anamorphic lens, claustrophobic framing, Hong Kong retro 1990s aesthetic

style_b.name: 茶山奇幻古风
style_b.prompt_suffix: lush green tea mountain, ethereal mist, golden sunrise, traditional Chinese fantasy, flowing hanfu robes, vibrant saturated colors, epic aerial landscape, dreamy oriental mythology

music_sync.lyrics: [Chorus 1] 凡人也有不凡的歌 / 唱给每一颗不甘的心

atmosphere.overall_mood: 茶山之巅的灵魂苏醒——航拍茶山晨雾中一袭白衣古装，云海翻腾，瞳孔中倒映茶山日出和金色代码流
atmosphere.lighting: 金色日出逆光+翠绿茶山反射光

video_prompt: Epic Chinese fantasy: a warrior in white robes standing on a misty tea mountain peak at sunrise, clouds rolling beneath, golden light and mist, his eyes reflecting tea mountains and golden code, traditional Chinese fantasy cinematography, vibrant and ethereal, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 第一副歌——主旋律全出，激昂但不失优雅
bgm.instruments: 管弦乐、合唱、电吉他、中国笛子

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 航拍——茶山梯田在晨雾中若隐若现，金色阳光从东方山脊射出，光芒穿透雾气形成金色光柱
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 茶山的黄金时刻——日出与晨雾
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 晨雾中的鸟鸣、远处流水
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Aerial shot of terraced tea mountains emerging from morning mist, golden sunrise rays breaking over an eastern mountain ridge creating dramatic god-rays through the fog, emerald green terraces visible where mist thins, golden light pillars cutting through the ethereal haze, Chinese fantasy dawn landscape, vibrant and mystical, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 中景——创作者B身着白色侠客长衫站在茶山梯田边缘，高马尾在风中飘动，面朝日出方向
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 白衣侠客与翠绿茶山——新世界的第一个清晨
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Medium shot of a young warrior in flowing white traditional Chinese robe standing at the edge of a green tea terrace, high ponytail blowing in the wind, facing the golden sunrise, his figure contrasting against the lush green terraces behind him, morning mist swirling at ground level, Chinese fantasy warrior at peace, vibrant colors, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 近景——创作者B缓缓睁开眼睛，金色日出的光线照在面部，眼神如鹰般锐利
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 苏醒的第一眼——全新的意识
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up portrait of a young warrior slowly opening his eyes in golden sunrise light, eagle-like fierce and clear gaze, high ponytail visible, white robe collar, golden light warming his face, green tea mountain landscape reflected softly in his eyes, awakening warrior with sharp determined expression, Chinese fantasy hero portrait, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 特写——瞳孔微距，金色日出与流动的金色代码同时在瞳孔中倒映，两个世界在眼中融合
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 两个世界在瞳孔中重叠——他同时属于两个维度
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Extreme macro close-up of a warrior's eye, the iris reflecting both a golden tea mountain sunrise AND streams of flowing golden digital code simultaneously, two worlds merging in the pupil, the eye sharp and hawk-like, intricate detail in the iris, cinematic macro shot bridging fantasy and digital, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 全景——创作者B深吸一口气，展开双臂，白色长衫在晨风中完全展开如巨大的白色翅膀
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 白衣如翼——灵魂完全苏醒的标志性姿态
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 衣袂展开的大幅声响、风声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Full shot of a warrior in white robes spreading his arms wide on a tea mountain peak, his flowing white garments catching the wind and spreading out like enormous white wings, golden sunrise behind him creating a radiant backlit silhouette, green tea terraces stretching below, epic Chinese fantasy hero pose, transcendent moment, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 低角度逆光——创作者B的白衣身影映在金色的日出中，像一尊活着的雕像，云海在脚下翻腾

characters.name: 创作者B
characters.action: 保持展臂姿态，微微仰头

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 逆光神像——凡人成为传奇的瞬间
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Low angle dramatic shot looking up at a white-robed warrior silhouetted against a golden sunrise, arms spread, head slightly raised to the sky, clouds rolling beneath his feet at the mountain peak, golden light creating a divine halo around his figure, epic backlit hero shot, Chinese fantasy apotheosis moment, vibrant gold and green, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角开始沿着茶山梯田的边缘行走——每踏出一步，脚下的茶叶都微微发光
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 每一步都让茶山回应——人与自然的共鸣
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 脚步声、茶叶微光共鸣声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Tracking medium shot of a white-robed warrior walking along the edge of a terraced tea mountain, each footstep causing the tea leaves nearby to glow faintly with cyan-green bioluminescence, golden morning light, mist at ground level, flowing white garments trailing behind, magical connection with nature, Chinese fantasy walking scene, vibrant green and gold, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 航拍跟拍——从空中看创作者B行走在蜿蜒的茶山梯田小路上，身后留下一道微微发光的痕迹
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 行者在茶山中的微小与伟大
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Aerial tracking shot from above showing a small white-robed figure walking along a winding path through lush green tea terraces, behind him a faintly glowing trail of light, the vast scale of the terraced mountains emphasizing both his smallness and his significance, golden morning light, mist in the valleys, Chinese fantasy aerial following shot, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 远景——创作者B走向远处一座云雾中若隐若现的山巅古亭，镜头缓慢远拉
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 目标在远方——山巅古亭等待
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Wide shot of a small white-robed figure walking through green tea terraces toward a distant mountain peak where an ancient pavilion is barely visible in the mist, the camera slowly pulling back to emphasize the epic journey ahead, layers of misty mountains, golden and green tones, Chinese fantasy pilgrimage scene, 16:9 aspect ratio
